titles.text: Mega Man: Dr Wily Visits Indonesia

descriptions.text: A romhack of Mega Man 3 featuring new level design and a story about Dr Wily invading Indonesia in search of some artifacts, prequel to the game "Mega Man : Indonesian Artifact"
Dr Wily invades Indonesia in search of some artifacts and Mega Man has to stop him, this game is a prequel to "Mega Man Indonesian Artifact"
